case_title: MICHAEL VERNA VS. INTER-CON SECURITY SYSTEMS, INC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VERNA, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTER-CON SECURITY SYSTEMS, INC $37.73 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $147.73, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO 1.25 HRS OF BACK PAY. NO WAITING TIME PENALTY AS THERE WAS GOOD FAITH DISPUTE OVER THE PAY DATE. NO WILLFUL FAILURE UNDER CCR 13520. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED OCT-28-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INTER-CON SECURITY SYSTEMS, INC
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT INTER-CON SECURITY SYSTEMS, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,805.59 FILED BY VERNA, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT INTER-CON SECURITY SYSTEMS, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL C. LAW. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RICHARD EATON-DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2013 - JUDGMENT.
